'''鈭歯g-dh-g''' ('''ngadhaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:habituate|habituate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:habituate|habituate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-dh-g
|-
! Lemma
| ngadhaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhagithi|ngadhagithi]] || [[word:ngadhagiji|ngadhagiji]] || [[word:ngadhagishi|ngadhagishi]] || [[word:ngadhagi|ngadhagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhaguthuth|ngadhaguthuth]] || [[word:ngadhagujuj|ngadhagujuj]] || [[word:ngadhagushush|ngadhagushush]] || [[word:ngadhag|ngadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhaguthu|ngadhaguthu]] || [[word:ngadhaguju|ngadhaguju]] || [[word:ngadhagushu|ngadhagushu]] || [[word:ngadhagu|ngadhagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhagufuth|ngadhagufuth]] || [[word:ngadhagufuj|ngadhagufuj]] || [[word:ngadhagufush|ngadhagufush]] || [[word:ngadhaguf|ngadhaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhagethe|ngadhagethe]] || [[word:ngadhageje|ngadhageje]] || [[word:ngadhageshe|ngadhageshe]] || [[word:ngadhage|ngadhage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhagothoth|ngadhagothoth]] || [[word:ngadhagojoj|ngadhagojoj]] || [[word:ngadhagoshosh|ngadhagoshosh]] || [[word:ngadhag|ngadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhagotho|ngadhagotho]] || [[word:ngadhagojo|ngadhagojo]] || [[word:ngadhagosho|ngadhagosho]] || [[word:ngadhago|ngadhago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhagofoth|ngadhagofoth]] || [[word:ngadhagofoj|ngadhagofoj]] || [[word:ngadhagofosh|ngadhagofosh]] || [[word:ngadhagof|ngadhagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhag忙th忙|ngadhag忙th忙]] || [[word:ngadhag忙j忙|ngadhag忙j忙]] || [[word:ngadhag忙sh忙|ngadhag忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngadhag忙|ngadhag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhagathath|ngadhagathath]] || [[word:ngadhagajaj|ngadhagajaj]] || [[word:ngadhagashash|ngadhagashash]] || [[word:ngadhag|ngadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhagatha|ngadhagatha]] || [[word:ngadhagaja|ngadhagaja]] || [[word:ngadhagasha|ngadhagasha]] || [[word:ngadhaga|ngadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhagafath|ngadhagafath]] || [[word:ngadhagafaj|ngadhagafaj]] || [[word:ngadhagafash|ngadhagafash]] || [[word:ngadhagaf|ngadhagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngadhagasha|ngadhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongadhagasha|gongadhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingadhagasha|gokingadhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngadhagn眉sha|ngadhagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongadhagnkn眉sha|gongadhagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhagn眉sha|gokingadhagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngadhagsh毛sha|ngadhagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongadhagnksh毛sha|gongadhagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingadhagsh毛sha|gokingadhagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhagrosha|ngadhagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhagnkrosha|gongadhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhagrosha|gokingadhagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhagmusha|ngadhagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhagnkmusha|gongadhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhagmusha|gokingadhagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngadhagsherasha|ngadhagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongadhagnksherasha|gongadhagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingadhagsherasha|gokingadhagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngadhagngasha|ngadhagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongadhagnkngasha|gongadhagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingadhagngasha|gokingadhagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngadhagyasha|ngadhagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongadhagnkyasha|gongadhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingadhagyasha|gokingadhagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngadhagyamasha|ngadhagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongadhagnkyamasha|gongadhagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingadhagyamasha|gokingadhagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhagn眉sh毛sha|ngadhagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhagnkn眉sh毛sha|gongadhagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhagn眉sh毛sha|gokingadhagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhagn眉rosha|ngadhagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhagnkn眉rosha|gongadhagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhagn眉rosha|gokingadhagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhagn眉musha|ngadhagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhagnkn眉musha|gongadhagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhagn眉musha|gokingadhagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhagsh毛n眉sha|ngadhagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhagnksh毛n眉sha|gongadhagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhagsh毛n眉sha|gokingadhagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhagsh毛rosha|ngadhagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhagnksh毛rosha|gongadhagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhagsh毛rosha|gokingadhagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhagsh毛musha|ngadhagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhagnksh毛musha|gongadhagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhagsh毛musha|gokingadhagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhagron眉sha|ngadhagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhagnkron眉sha|gongadhagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhagron眉sha|gokingadhagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhagrosh毛sha|ngadhagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhagnkrosh毛sha|gongadhagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhagrosh毛sha|gokingadhagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhagromusha|ngadhagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhagnkromusha|gongadhagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhagromusha|gokingadhagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhagmun眉sha|ngadhagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhagnkmun眉sha|gongadhagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhagmun眉sha|gokingadhagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhagmush毛sha|ngadhagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhagnkmush毛sha|gongadhagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhagmush毛sha|gokingadhagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhagmurosha|ngadhagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhagnkmurosha|gongadhagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhagmurosha|gokingadhagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngadhag|ngadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙dh忙g|ng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongadhag|hongadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙dh忙g|hong忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongadhag|hohongadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙dh忙g|hohong忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngadhag|n眉ngadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙dh忙g|n眉ng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngadhag|n眉n眉ngadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙dh忙g|n眉n眉ng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngadhag|n茂ngadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙dh忙g|n茂ng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngadhag|n茂n茂ngadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙dh忙g|n茂n茂ng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungadhag|lungadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙dh忙g|lung忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungadhag|lulungadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙dh忙g|lulung忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingadhag|lingadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙dh忙g|ling忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingadhag|lilingadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙dh忙g|liling忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongadhag|kongadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙dh忙g|kong忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongadhag|kokongadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙dh忙g|kokong忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengadhag|kengadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙dh忙g|keng忙dh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengadhag|kekengadhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙dh忙g|kekeng忙dh忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
